summary.en: IEC 61851-1 is the international reference for EV conductive charging systems, including EV supply equipment operating characteristics, the EV-to-EVSE connection, charging modes, and electrical safety requirements. In Oman, IEC 61851 evidence may be requested by DGSM-related documentation, utilities, consultants, tenders, fleet buyers, insurers, or site engineers even where a single national public-charger type-approval route is not identified for the project.
summary.zh: IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导充电系统的国际参考，覆盖供电设备运行特性、车辆与供电设备连接、充电模式和电气安全要求。在阿曼，即使项目未识别出统一的全国公共充电桩型式批准路径，DGSM相关文件、公用事业单位、顾问、招标方、车队买方、保险方或现场工程师也可能要求IEC 61851证据。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導充電系統的國際參考，覆蓋供電設備運行特性、車輛與供電設備連接、充電模式和電氣安全要求。在阿曼，即使項目未識別出統一的全國公共充電樁型式批准路徑，DGSM相關文件、公用事業單位、顧問、招標方、車隊買方、保險方或現場工程師也可能要求IEC 61851證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 for EMC of off-board EV charging systems where applicable
IEC 61851-23 for DC EV charging stations where applicable
IEC 61851-24 for DC charging digital communication where applicable

summary.en: China EV charger files commonly cite GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems, with GB/T 20234.1-2023, GB/T 20234.2-2015, GB/T 20234.3-2023, and GB/T 27930-2023 often appearing in the connector and DC-communication evidence set. The GB/T evidence can support technical review, but it is not automatically a substitute for IEC 61851 clause mapping, English documentation, Oman installation review, or buyer-specified IEC reports.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩资料通常引用GB/T 18487.1-2023作为传导充电系统依据，连接器和直流通信证据集中也常见GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015、GB/T 20234.3-2023和GB/T 27930-2023。GB/T证据可支持技术审查，但不能自动替代IEC 61851条款映射、英文资料、阿曼安装审查或买方指定的IEC报告。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁資料通常引用GB/T 18487.1-2023作為傳導充電系統依據，連接器和直流通訊證據集中也常見GB/T 20234.1-2023、GB/T 20234.2-2015、GB/T 20234.3-2023和GB/T 27930-2023。GB/T證據可支持技術審查，但不能自動替代IEC 61851條款映射、英文資料、阿曼安裝審查或買方指定的IEC報告。

gap.en: Prepare a clause-by-clause bridge from GB/T 18487.1 test reports, EVSE ratings, protection functions, RCD or residual-current strategy, isolation monitoring where relevant, manuals, markings, and installation instructions to the requested IEC 61851 clauses. Confirm the edition and whether the requirement is regulatory, utility-driven, tender-driven, insurer-driven, or voluntary before presenting it as mandatory.
gap.zh: 应将GB/T 18487.1测试报告、EVSE额定值、保护功能、RCD或剩余电流保护策略、适用时的绝缘监测、说明书、标识和安装指南逐条映射至所要求的IEC 61851条款。将其表述为强制要求前，应确认版本以及该要求属于监管、公用事业、招标、保险还是自愿要求。
gap.zht: 應將GB/T 18487.1測試報告、EVSE額定值、保護功能、RCD或剩餘電流保護策略、適用時的絕緣監測、說明書、標識和安裝指南逐條映射至所要求的IEC 61851條款。將其表述為強制要求前，應確認版本以及該要求屬於監管、公用事業、招標、保險還是自願要求。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-specific unless incorporated by Oman regulation, DGSM requirement, utility condition, tender, contract, insurer requirement, or electrical-installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended national standard evidence unless made mandatory by Chinese procurement, project approval, local inspection, or another binding instrument

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence should be mapped to IEC 61851 when Oman project documents, DGSM-related review, or utility engineers ask for IEC-style EVSE safety evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼项目文件、DGSM相关审查或公用事业工程师要求IEC类EVSE安全证据时，应将GB/T 18487.1-2023证据映射至IEC 61851。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼項目文件、DGSM相關審查或公用事業工程師要求IEC類EVSE安全證據時，應將GB/T 18487.1-2023證據映射至IEC 61851。
